[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKETS.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARISON WITH A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE PERFORMANCE OF BOTH MODELS IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE WITH A ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.98. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A LOWER ACCURACY OF 95.2% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.95. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN THE CURRENT MULTINOMIAL MODEL. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN THE CURRENT MULTINOMIAL MODEL.]
